cit.basis: Impuesto sobre las Utilidades, Ley 7092 del Impuesto sobre la Renta: flat 30% on net income for companies above the SME gross-income ceiling.

sme_regime.note: 2025 published slice values: companies with gross income up to CRC 122,145,000 pay 5%/10%/15%/20% progressively on slices of net income.

cit.note: Administered by the Ministerio de Hacienda / Dirección General de Tributación. Fiscal year aligned to the calendar year since the 2019 reform (Ley 9635).

vat.note: IVA (Impuesto al Valor Agregado) 13% standard rate (Ley 9635); reduced rates of 4%, 2% and 1% apply to specific goods and services.

territorial_system.note: Costa Rica applies a territorial system: only Costa Rican-source income is subject to income tax; most foreign-source income is out of scope (subject to anti-abuse rules per Ley 10381).

official_sources.name: Ministerio de Hacienda de Costa Rica

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; SME thresholds and slices are updated annually by executive decree.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
SME eligibility depends on gross income; slices apply to net income.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, credit, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
